rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE CLOTILDE CARCAMO FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Respondent Jorge E Carcamo To Petition And Amendment To Petition Of Petitioners Isabel Arostegui Aristides Carcamo Eduardo Carcamo Nadia Merlo Amanda Hosea Jessica Hosea And Jonathan Hosea
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer to Petition and Amendment to Petition is sustained with leave to amend. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, March 20, 2019.
